posts.author: Dailytrader
posts.text: Which is the best source for options historical data — I heard about Accelpix; they provide IEOD and EOD historical data for a longer period. You can contact them once.

posts.author: sahil1
posts.text: Which is the best source for options historical data — hi i am sahil savaliya i have data for 1 minute option ohlc data along with greeks, volume, synthetic future and pcr 20 strikes a day for nifty data is from jan 21 to apr 26 for sensex data is from jan 24 to apr 26 data format is parquest files and bifurcated year wise in daily and monthly parquest file its such a big amount of data if interested then mail me mail id - sahilsavliya18@gmail.com
